title: Emerald  Equipment
description: This mod adds Emerald armor and tools, those features are wished by the community but Mojang refuses to add them and this is why the Emerald Equipement mod exists :)
body:
## 📘 What Does Our Mod Add:

> The Emerald Set Mod is a Minecraft mod that adds emerald tools and armor,  the thing that differentiates it from other mods is its vanilla style so there's nothing modded it's just basic tools without any special powers (hammers, tree axes/excavators) emerald armor and tools are slightly better than those of diamonds.

## 😀Why should you download our mod and not other emerald mods :

> this mod takes a vanilla style so by adding it on minecraft you have the feeling that you are playing minecraft and not another game and if you love the vanilla feeling you should take a look 👀
